# Instructions for GitHub Copilot

These instructions provide guidance on how to configure and use GitHub Copilot effectively within this repository.

## Configuration

1. Ensure that the GitHub Copilot extension is installed and enabled in your development environment.
2. Configure the settings in `.github/copilot/settings.json` as needed for this repository.

## Usage

- Use GitHub Copilot to assist with code completion and suggestions.
- Follow the coding standards and practices outlined in this repository.
- Review and modify Copilot suggestions to ensure they meet the project's requirements.
- Report any issues or unexpected behavior with GitHub Copilot to the repository maintainers.

## Enterprise Reference

Right now we are experimenting to see what works and what doesn't for some of the enterpise-only documentation. I suspect it will work without any extra modifications, but if not, we'll need to train GitHub Copilot to use our plugin/marketplace style.

The enterprise root URL is:
```
https://docs.github.com/en/enterprise-cloud@latest
```

Here's some references:
- https://docs.github.com/en/enterprise-cloud@latest/copilot/reference/customization-cheat-sheet
- https://docs.github.com/en/enterprise-cloud@latest/copilot/reference/copilot-cli-reference/cli-config-dir-reference#configuration-file-settings
- https://docs.github.com/en/enterprise-cloud@latest/copilot/concepts/agents/about-plugins


For enterprise users, refer to the [GitHub Copilot Enterprise documentation](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/enterprise) for additional configuration and usage guidelines.
